meta.description: A private-office-style venture ecosystem for capital, credit, AI systems, partner distribution, tools, banking, media, and community.

blocks.headline: Build. Buy. Fund. Automate.
blocks.subheadline: JF Ventures is a private-office-style ecosystem for operators, partners, and business owners using capital strategy, fintech systems, AI workflows, and affiliate distribution to grow cash-flowing companies.

blocks.title: The Operating Stack
blocks.description: Move through the ecosystem by outcome: capital, credit, partners, AI, tools, banking, education, and community.

items.title: Capital
items.description: Funding pathways, lender access, acquisition capital, and prequalification flows.

items.title: Credit
items.description: Business and personal credit systems that support stronger approvals.

items.title: Partners
items.description: Referral, broker, affiliate, and sub-affiliate opportunities.

items.title: AI
items.description: Custom GPTs, agents, prompts, automations, and workflow systems.

items.title: Tools
items.description: Software, calculators, templates, and automation assets.

items.title: Banking
items.description: Business banking, fintech accounts, spend, merchant services, and cash-flow tools.

items.title: Learn / Media
items.description: Field notes, videos, guides, playbooks, case studies, and operator intelligence.

items.title: Community
items.description: Partner network, Moonshine Moneymakers, Cashflow Nights, and private hubs.

blocks.title: Choose Your Mission
blocks.description: Route visitors based on intent. Store answers in localStorage during beta; send them to /api/lead later.

pathways.label: I want to become a partner
I want AI systems or agents

blocks.title: Request Access
blocks.description: Tell us what you are building, selling, buying, or funding. We will route you to the right capital, partner, AI, or tool pathway.
